creator: iron.udjin@gmail.com
text:
> When debugging core(5) files plain "bt" may show backtrace for an unrelated (non-crashing) thread, so use "thread apply bt all" instead.

$ gdb /usr/local/bin/vainfo /var/tmp/1001.vainfo.core -ex "thread apply all bt"
...
Program terminated with signal SIGFPE, Arithmetic exception.
Integer divide by zero.
#0  0x000000082ea9d555 in object_heap_destroy (heap=heap@entry=0x82ca080d0) at object_heap.c:275
275	object_heap.c: No such file or directory.

Thread 1 (LWP 101649):
#0  0x000000082ea9d555 in object_heap_destroy (heap=heap@entry=0x82ca080d0) at object_heap.c:275
#1  0x000000082eaa094a in destroy_heap (heap=0x82ca080d0, user_data=0x82ca08000, name=<optimized out>, destroy_func=<optimized out>) at vdpau_driver.c:138
#2  vdpau_common_Terminate (driver_data=0x82ca08000) at vdpau_driver.c:159
#3  vdpau_Terminate_Current (ctx=ctx@entry=0x82c9e1000) at ./vdpau_driver_template.h:537
#4  0x000000082eaa0383 in vdpau_Initialize_Current (ctx=<optimized out>) at ./vdpau_driver_template.h:563
#5  __vaDriverInit_1_17 (ctx=0x82c9e1000) at vdpau_driver.c:317
#6  0x0000000820e8c2b3 in vaInitialize () from /usr/local/lib/libva.so.2
#7  0x0000000000203ed5 in main (argc=<optimized out>, argv=0x820890330) at ../vainfo/vainfo.c:520

> Can you try the attached workaround (not the inlined below)?

The same problem with "Floating exception".

> Alternatively, try using NVDEC directly via mpv --hwdec=nvdec

mpv log:
[vo/gpu] Loading hwdec drivers for format: 'cuda'
[vo/gpu] Loading hwdec driver 'cuda'
Cannot load libcuda.so.1
[vo/gpu/cuda] Failed to load CUDA symbols
[vo/gpu] Loading failed.


Tried to build nvidia-vaapi-driver but it couldn't set correct paths. It says:
meson.build:18:0: ERROR: C shared or static library 'EGL' not found
...but libEGL.so exists in /usr/local/lib. It seems I need to path local prefix somehow. Tried: "meson setup --prefix=/usr/local build" but it doesn't work.
